title: Cobblemon Perfected
description: This modpack is designed to enhance your Cobblemon experience, adding a variety of extras and features to keep you engaged for hours.
body:
![Perfected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02660e8b63ea4a0f5d1e9c546c9527cd22f0f3fc.png)

Embark on an exciting journey with the Cobblemon Modpack, a unique twist on Minecraft that combines the creativity of block building with the thrill of catching and training your favorite creatures! This modpack is designed to enhance your Cobblemon experience, adding a variety of extras and features to keep you engaged for hours.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab4bc0e78b89b3b8dc2c3aedc24a10c54d3b3dc3.png)

**Cobblemon Integration:** Explore a world teeming with Cobblemon! Catch, train, and battle them as you build your ultimate team.

**Expanded Furniture:** Discover new furniture for your own buildings!

**Custom Quests:** Engage in a series of quests that guide you through the world, offering rewards and challenges. (Coming Soon...)
    
**New Tools and Gear:** Craft specialized tools and gear to aid in your exploration and Cobblemon battles.
    
**More Structures and Ruins:** Unearth hidden treasures and discover new ruins around the world.
    
**Multiplayer Ready:** Team up with friends to trade, battle, or explore the world together by opening the Port to others, completely free!

![Why Perfected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc52005fb113f25b0433486ff856b431e473c0e3.png)

This modpack is perfect for players who want more depth and excitement in their Cobblemon gameplay. Whether you're a seasoned adventurer or new to Minecraft mods, this pack provides a well-rounded experience with plenty of opportunities for creativity, exploration, and strategy.

Install the Cobblemon Adventure Modpack today and start your epic journey in a world where Minecraft meets Cobblemon! Will you be the ultimate trainer?

_At least 4 GB of RAM recommended._

**_Get ready to craft, catch, and conquer!_**
